title: 10 health benefits of Ammi visnaga (khella)
intro: Ammi visnaga has health benefits such as reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues. Its medicinal properties include flavonoids, lignans, and coumarins that possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic activities. This plant can improve lives by alleviating symptoms of asthma, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions, allowing individuals to breathe easier and enjoy daily activities without discomfort. Additionally, its anti-inflammatory effects can help soothe joint pain and digestive issues, promoting overall well-being and quality of life.
